comments.text:
49:31 Capybara spaghetti...

Some places in Peru:

1) Los géisers Ojo del Angel o la Olla del Diablo en el Valle de Candarave:

Vídeo: Este lugar parece de otro planeta…
Channel: Frans

2) Short video: PORTADA DEL DIABLO, Aramu Muru - Puno Peru - CÓMO LLEGAR
Channel: Trek AVENTURAS

3) And in Cusco, where recent discoveries have been made. In a recent publication about T'aqrachullo—which means “Mother Rock of Frozen Water”—located on a rocky outcrop surrounded by three canyons and water, where water was found at the summit, and where Inca artifacts as well as those from other cultures have been discovered in this ancient citadel.:

Vídeo: 🔴🔵 Ciudadela perdida de los incas: Hallan piezas históricas que pertenecían a T'aqrachullo

Channel: Exitosa Noticias

Vídeos shorts:

Vídeo: María Fortaleza o Taqrachullo
Channel: vibrantperu

Vídeo: T'AQRACHULLO MARAVILLA DEL SUR CUSCO Información Útil 
Channel: peruvipviajes

More vídeos:

4) Video: CORICANCHA, el Templo más importante de los Incas.

Channel: Jorge de la Rosa

5) In Cusco you also have there Waqrapukara or the Fortress of the Horns, not very well known even by the Peruvians themselves. They say that the surrounding landscape surpasses Machu Picchu.

A foreign media compares it as out of The Lord of the Rings, it seems to me that it is almost identical to the Top of the Winds, Amon Sûl, which appears in the first film The Fellowship of the Ring, where Frodo is wounded by the Ringwraiths. You have this video for reference:

Vídeo: Waqrapukara fortress tour - trekking to Waqrapukara (Cusco, Peru)
Channel: Inca Highlands

6) Vídeo: Choquequirao Trek  Cinematic Drone Video
Channel: Léonard DIDELET

7) Vídeo: TIPON CUSCO - TEMPLO DEL AGUA INCA
Channel: Yer Aventuras7

9) Vídeo: CUSCO en AUTO: 02 DÍAS explorando el INCREIBLE glaciar SUYUPARINA !
Channel: Dante en Ruta

10) Vídeo: AUSANGATE – RAINBOW MOUNTAIN TO SIBINACOCHA TREK 7D

11) La laguna Roja en Cusco:

This lagoon has an unreal color, almost fluorescent; it appears at the 7:38 mark:

Short: LAGUNA DE 7 COLORES - CANTA - LIMA Channel: VIAJANDO CON CRI CRI  - CRMH

Vídeo: Laguna Esmeralda un nuevo destino Turístico que te espera
Channel: Esmeralda Tours

And there is much more in Peru that remains a mystery because most of the jungle has not been explored as thoroughly as other areas, and because the Incas—like other cultures in Peru—remain a mystery.

Greetings from Peru.
